overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city center. The player character walks along covered sidewalks, crosses a wet intersection with heavy traffic, and continues along a commercial street lined with digital billboards and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered sidewalk with teal glass railings, approaching a major intersection

entered.detail: transparent glass railing with teal tint running along the left side of the walkway
tall building-mounted digital screens displaying colorful advertisements with pink and cyan neon lighting
reflective wet pavement showing mirror-like reflections of neon lights
tall modern street lamp with bright white illumination

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered pedestrian walkway with teal glass railings on the left. The wet concrete reflects the vibrant pink and cyan neon billboards mounted on the surrounding skyscrapers. The area is relatively empty with only distant traffic visible on the adjacent street.

events.description: exits covered walkway and turns right onto open crosswalk
crossing the street while vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk through the busy intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing crossing from right to left across the crosswalk

entered.detail: bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall building with prominent red neon 'Fuyutsuki' signage running vertically
large digital advertisement screen displaying 'Nicola' branding with a figure in a hat
tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian crossing signals

segments.scene_description: Turning right to cross the wide open intersection. The prominent red Fuyutsuki neon sign dominates the right side while yellow crosswalk stripes guide the path across the wet asphalt. A pedestrian crosses in the opposite direction as vehicles move through the intersection.

events.description: police vehicle temporarily blocks view while passing on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts, parked vehicles, and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black police SUV parked on the sidewalk curb with emergency lights

entered.detail: glowing teal and pink neon awning over a commercial entrance
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
low horizontal digital billboard displaying 'Cola' with a figure wearing a hat
short black and yellow posts lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk past various neon-lit storefronts and advertisements. A police SUV is parked on the right curb near a glowing storefront. The street features an overhead pedestrian bridge in the distance and moderate pedestrian traffic walking along the illuminated commercial corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded pedestrian walkway into the bustling heart of a neon-drenched city intersection. It begins along a covered path with teal glass railings, where wet concrete reflects the vibrant pink and cyan glow of towering skyscrapers. As the camera turns right, the scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by a prominent red Fuyutsuki sign and yellow crosswalk stripes cutting through the rain-slicked asphalt. The movement then shifts toward the opposite sidewalk, passing glowing storefronts and a parked police SUV. Finally, the view expands along an illuminated commercial corridor, moving past moderate pedestrian traffic toward a distant overhead bridge.
